title: Evolutionary Game Theory & Replicator Dynamics

addition_sequential.reason: Both flows are EML-2 (real payoffs, relative fitness = log-ratio); composition stays EML-2 via Fubini-type idempotency

multiplication_simultaneous.operation: Two replicator systems coupled: x⊗y (two populations)
multiplication_simultaneous.prediction: 2⊗2 = max(2,2) = 2 (same type: both real payoff = EML-2)
multiplication_simultaneous.observed: Coupled replicators: L(x,y) = still EML-2 (product payoff matrix)

ess_existence.formula: σ* ESS iff U(σ*,σ*) > U(σ,σ*) for all σ≠σ*
ess_existence.shadow_why: Best response U(σ*,σ*): expected utility = EML-2

stability_eigenvalue.formula: Jacobian J of replicator at ESS: all eigenvalues Re(λ)<0

hawk_dove.semiring_verdict: Hawk-Dove: 2⊗2=2 (two-strategy tensor product); phase transition at C=V = TYPE 2

selection_mutation.formula: ẋᵢ = xᵢ(fᵢ - f̄) + Σⱼ μⱼᵢxⱼ - μᵢxᵢ

quasispecies.formula: ẋᵢ = Σⱼ Qᵢⱼfⱼxⱼ - φxᵢ where φ = Σᵢfᵢxᵢ

mutation_matrix.Q_ij: exp(-μd(i,j)): exponential decay with Hamming distance

semiring_verdicts.TYPE2_transitions: Error threshold, C=V bifurcation = TYPE 2 Horizon

key_theorem: Evolutionary Semiring Theorem (S278): Replicator dynamics fully respects the tropical depth semiring. 2⊗2=2: coupled replicator systems (tensor product of two EML-2 flows) = EML-2. max rule: selection(EML-2) ⊗ mutation(EML-0) = max(2,0) = 2 (selection dominates). ESS existence = EML-∞ (non-constructive); shadow=EML-2 (expected utility). Phase transitions (error threshold, Hawk-Dove C=V) = TYPE 2 Horizon. New finding: mutation is EML-0 (permutation matrix = algebraic), not EML-2. Selection DOMINATES mutation in the max-semiring: max(2,0)=2.
rabbit_hole_log: max(2,0)=2: selection dominates mutation — mutation is EML-0 (permutation matrix)
Hawk-Dove: C=V bifurcation = TYPE 2; mixed ESS = EML-2
Quasispecies: exp(-mu*d) = EML-2; error threshold = TYPE 2
